body.text: **Top story:** OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 — the first frontier model with native computer use and a 1M-token context window — on the same day China's premier delivers a Government Work Report placing AI at the center of the 15th Five-Year Plan.

items.text: **🤖 1. OpenAI Launches GPT-5.4 with Native Computer Use**

body.text:
OpenAI released **GPT-5.4** — its most capable frontier model — combining advanced reasoning, coding, and agentic computer use. Three variants: Standard, Thinking (reasoning-first), and Pro (enterprise).

• **Native computer use**: First OpenAI model that can simulate mouse, keyboard, and menus to operate software autonomously
• **1M-token context window** — largest OpenAI has offered commercially
• **Tool Search**: Dynamically loads tool definitions on demand — major cost/latency reduction for agentic systems
• **83%** on GDPval knowledge work benchmark (vs 70.9% for GPT-5.2); **75%** on OSWorld-V (vs 72.4% human)
• **33%** fewer individual claim errors vs GPT-5.2

Available in ChatGPT Plus/Team/Pro, OpenAI API, and GitHub Copilot (same day).

items.text: **👨‍💻 2. GitHub Copilot Integrates GPT-5.4 Hours After Launch**

body.text: Microsoft rolled out GPT-5.4 across all Copilot paid tiers on launch day — one of the fastest major model integrations on record. Available across **VS Code, Visual Studio, JetBrains, Xcode, Eclipse**, and GitHub web/mobile. Includes native computer control, 1M-token context, and both Thinking and Pro variants. Enterprise admins must enable in policy settings first.

items.text: **🇨🇳 3. China Two Sessions: AI Gets Its Own Five-Year Plan Section**

body.text:
Premier Li Qiang's Government Work Report placed AI more prominently than any prior national plan. Highlights:
• GDP target: **4.5–5%** for 2026
• 15th Five-Year Plan gives AI its **own section for the first time**
• **"AI Plus"** initiative expanded: embed AI across all industrial sectors, accelerate agents and intelligent terminals
• Explicit goal: explore pathways to **AGI**
• Priority sectors: embodied AI, brain-computer interfaces, 6G
• Target: **$1.4 trillion AI industry by 2030**

Beijing explicitly frames these investments as a counter to U.S. export controls, doubling down on Huawei Ascend and Cambricon chips.

items.text: **⚖️ 4. Anthropic Prepares Legal Challenge to Pentagon Designation**

body.text: Following the March 4 Pentagon blacklisting, Dario Amodei issued a public statement reaffirming Anthropic's two red lines: no Claude use for **domestic mass surveillance** or **autonomous weapons**. Legal grounds: First Amendment (retaliation for safety views) and Fifth Amendment (penalties without due process). Multiple tech companies signaled support. *(Formal lawsuits filed March 9; hearing on March 24.)*

items.text: **🕐 5. DeepSeek V4: All Launch Windows Missed — Still Waiting**

body.text: DeepSeek V4 has missed mid-February, Lunar New Year, late-February, and early-March windows. Still no official launch as of March 5. Expected specs unchanged: 1T parameters (32B active, MoE), fully multimodal, 1M+ context, $0.10–$0.30/M tokens. Community speculation suggests team may be waiting for GPT-5.4 launch day coverage to pass.

• **Alibaba Qwen 3.5 9B** — outperforms models 13x its size on graduate-level reasoning; major open-source attention
• **Lightricks LTX 2.3** — open-source model generating native 4K video with synchronized audio in one pass
• **NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super (120B)** — enterprise coding model at GTC; 60.47% on SWE-Bench Verified
• **China AI labeling** — mandatory AI-generated content identifiers now enforced across Douyin, Tencent, DeepSeek

• **DeepSeek V4** — launch inevitable this week; benchmarks vs GPT-5.4 will dominate coverage
• **GPT-5.4 computer use** — early developer testing underway; watch for real-world autonomous task completion reports
• **Anthropic lawsuit** — formal filing expected within days
• **China Two Sessions** — sessions run through ~March 14; more AI policy details to emerge
• **Apple M5 hardware** — ships March 11; first real-world AI performance data incoming
